pages.ocr_text: Patient Name: Maria Thompson. Date: 2026-03-01. Chief Complaint: Neck pain and headaches.

pages.pdf2html_text: Procedure: Selective Nerve Block. The patient was placed supine. Local anesthesia was used. Repeated aspiration checks were negative.
Procedure: Stellate Ganglion Block. Chassaignac's tubercle was identified. 10 cc of injectate was administered under fluoroscopic guidance.
